snippet.title: Hype (Official Video) | My Roots | Ranjit Bawa | Bunty Bains | Desi Crew | Latest Punjabi Song 2026
snippet.description:
Speed Records brings the energy with Hype, a new Punjabi song by Ranjit Bawa. Known for his powerful voice and distinct style, Ranjit Bawa delivers a vibrant performance that blends catchy hooks with modern Punjabi music, making this song a perfect pick for today’s pop playlist.                                               

Hype taps into the current wave of new Punjabi songs, offering a high-energy sound that appeals to fans of Punjabi pop songs, latest Punjabi music, and upbeat desi vibes. The Punjabi pop song stands out with its rhythm and that unmistakable Ranjit swag that his audience loves. Whether you’re cruising, looking for a workout song, on a long drive, or just in the mood for something lively, this song fits right in.

For fans searching for Punjabi songs 2026, new Punjabi songs, or Punjabi pop hits, Hype is a must-listen. If you’ve followed Bawa’s, this new Ranjit Bawa song brings that familiar charm with a fresh twist. Check out the song now!

snippet.title: The Odyssey | Official New Trailer
snippet.description:
The Odyssey - In Theaters 7 17 26

Christopher Nolan’s next film, The Odyssey, is a mythic action epic shot across the world using brand new IMAX® film technology. The film brings Homer’s foundational saga to IMAX® film screens for the first time and opens in theaters everywhere on July 17, 2026. 

The Odyssey stars Matt Damon, Tom Holland, Anne Hathaway, Robert Pattinson and Lupita Nyong’o, with Zendaya and Charlize Theron.

The Odyssey is produced by Emma Thomas and Christopher Nolan for their company, Syncopy. The executive producer is Thomas Hayslip.

snippet.title: UFC 6 Official Reveal Trailer
snippet.description:
Pre-order UFC® 6 Ultimate Edition to receive 7-day early access and the Iconic Moments Bundle: https://x.ea.com/89093

UFC 6 is powered by fighters. Evolved striking and motion systems bring those UFC stars to life in the Octagon, while new game modes introduce immersive storytelling that makes every fight feel personal. That starts with Markerless Capture, which delivers unprecedented fighter fidelity with authentic locomotion and Signature Strikes, complemented by new fighter bodies built with Sapien Technology that make your favorite UFC superstars truly look, move, and fight like themselves. 

Real-Time Contact brings the impact to the Octagon with Frostbite™ powered ragdoll physics and damage reactions that hurt so good. When you really start dishing out the damage, enter Flow State, which engages an athlete's standout skills in punishing fashion.

Synopsis of the Movie: Evil Dead Burn unleashes the franchise’s most savage and terrifying ride to date, blazing onto big screens with an all-new chapter of carnage and demonic mayhem. snippet.title: INVINCIBLE VS Voice Actor Plays Invincible VS
snippet.description:
Mark, this is good news... we can be [TITLE CARD]. I'm so stoked to get to say that I've been the voice of Invincible in the INVINCIBLE VS game for the last 10 months. It took me 5 rounds of auditions, but to get to act along side J.K. Simmons & all of the other stars from the show is a dream come true. Biggest of thanks to Meredith Layne (the voice director from the show), Robert Kirkman, Skybound, Quarter Up, & Skybound Entertainment for trusting me with this role! Also I spent many months putting this suit together so I hope y'all like this stream! IT WAS A LOT OF EFFORT (plus programming the title cards during the stream as well) 😮‍💨  SO I HOPE Y'ALL LIKE THIS VIDEO!!! 

For those who don’t know, I’m the voice of Mark Grayson (INVINCIBLE) in Invincible VS! If you wanna catch my next stream, be sure to follow my Twitch at www.twitch.tv/alekslevo
